resources.string: Location permission is required for the walking tour
This app needs location access to provide navigation and detect when you arrive at tour waypoints. Without location access, the tour experience will be limited.
No internet connection. Some features may be limited.
📍 You appear to be outside Bruff town area.\n\nPlease start the application after you are in the main street for the best tour experience!
You\'re in Bruff — ready to start!
Bruff Heritage Trail is a self-guided walking tour of 4 historic sites in Bruff, Co. Limerick — about 90 minutes at a relaxed pace.

You need to be in Bruff to begin. If you\'re not there yet, the app will show you how far away you are and automatically return to the home screen after a few seconds — just reopen the tour once you\'ve arrived.
Once you\'re in the area, tap Start Tour. The app will show you a live route from wherever you are to the first stop.

• The blue line guides you to the very first stop.\n• Once you\'re on the trail, the gold line connects all 4 stops in order — that\'s your route for the rest of the walk.\n• The arrow and distance at the bottom of the screen always point to your next stop.
When you\'re close enough to a site, you\'ll get an arrival notification. Tap it to read about the site\'s history, then tap Continue to move on to the next stop.
🔵 Blue, pulsing marker — your current target\n🟢 Green marker — a stop still ahead\n⚪ Grey marker with a checkmark — a stop you\'ve already visited

• Keep your phone unlocked during the walk — the screen stays on automatically while you\'re navigating.\n• The GPS badge in the corner shows your location accuracy (● good, ◑ fair, ○ low).\n• If you wander outside the Bruff area mid-walk, you\'ll get a reminder to head back.
